scripts.db:migrate:notes: wrangler d1 migrations apply apple-sync --local --migrations-dir migrations/notes
scripts.db:migrate:events: wrangler d1 migrations apply apple-sync --local --migrations-dir migrations/events
scripts.db:migrate:notes:remote: wrangler d1 migrations apply apple-sync --remote --migrations-dir migrations/notes
scripts.db:migrate:events:remote: wrangler d1 migrations apply apple-sync --remote --migrations-dir migrations/events
